originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Benchmarking 5090 and Replacing Syon Bindings in PufferLib
summary: Benchmarked a new 5090 GPU for reinforcement learning training, finding only ~10-15% speedup over previous hardware. Implemented a new C-based binding system to replace Syon, reducing boilerplate from thousands of lines to ~500. Fixed environment seeding to ensure unique seeds across workers and processes.
